title: cestrum diurnum var. venenatum
intro: Cestrum diurnum var. venenatum, also known as the day-blooming jessamine or nightshade, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cestrum diurnum var. venenatum include its ability to relieve anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cestrum diurnum var. venenatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
